detailed_camera_plan: Start from 秦嬴's eye level, tilting up to focus on the security camera mounted on the ceiling corner.
action_description: 秦嬴观察到餐厅天花板处的监控设备，眼神锐利。
staging_description: 秦嬴站在餐厅中央，监控设备位于右上方天花板边缘。

character_poses.秦嬴: head tilted upward, focused gaze, neutral expression

ending_composition_description: Close-up of the security camera, with 秦嬴's shoulder visible in the lower frame.
